posts.author: India Infoline
posts.text: Apollo Micro Systems Shares Hit Fresh 52-Week High After Strong Q4 FY26 Results; Stock Surges Over 22% in 3 Sessions

posts.author: The Economic Times
posts.text: Multibagger Apollo Micro Systems shares soar 19% in two sessions. What’s behind the sharp rise?

posts.author: vivek_17
posts.community: Apollo Micro Systems Limited - A Small cap in Aerospace & Defense
posts.text: Excellent results- yes. Shift from component supplier to OEM for multiple products is a big achievement. However, FY27 &28 orders from MoD as well as exports will decide the next trajectory. Also on the watch will be IDL expl turning profitable. High Promoter pledge continues to be an overhang. Anyone wanting to buy at this level should consider the valuation risk. Disclaimer- invested from lower levels.

posts.community: Apollo Micro Systems Limited - A Small cap in Aerospace & Defense
